CHART 59
This native will have medium
education. At 24, he will start Dh. Jupt. Ven.
service under some one. He will
be married at 25 and rise high.
Things will get better for him Sun
Mer.
between 36-45. He will have to

Sat. Dt
ments will be his lot. He will have

His wife will be of a dogged type; but he will live happily up to 80 years.
